# BSAS – Bharat Spares & Services

> Manufacturers of advanced drill rigs and suppliers of rock drill spares, hydraulic assemblies, and refurbishment services for mining and construction machinery. Based in Raniganj, West Bengal, India.

BSAS (Bharat Spares & Services) engineers, manufactures, and rebuilds critical systems for heavy equipment across mining, ports, and construction. The company manufactures India's first man-portable drill rig and supplies OEM-grade spare parts for rock drills, hydraulic systems, drifters, gearboxes, and more. BSAS serves customers across India with 50+ years of combined team experience and a 26+ acre workshop facility.

## Products & Services

- [Spare Parts](/spare-parts): Rock drill spares, drifter assemblies, hydraulic pumps, feed systems, and gearbox components for mining and construction machinery.
- [Equipment](/equipments): Advanced drill rigs including India's first man-portable rig for remote and high-altitude exploration. Compatible with brands including Atlas Copco, Sandvik, Ingersoll-Rand.
- [Services](/services): Equipment overhaul, hydraulic refurbishment, component rebuild, field support, and 3R (Rebuild, Repair, Recycle) programmes.
- [E-Shop](/e-shop): Online catalogue for browsing and requesting quotes on spare parts, hydraulic assemblies, drifters, and gearboxes.

## Company Information

- [About BSAS](/about-us): Company background, manufacturing capabilities, team experience, and certifications.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photo albums from field operations, workshop activity, and engineering projects.
- [Support / Contact](/support): Quote requests, spare parts enquiries, and after-sales support. Responds within one business day.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about spare parts ordering, lead times, OEM compatibility, and the e-shop.

## Key Facts

- **Founded**: Raniganj, West Bengal, India (WB 713347)
- **Specialisation**: Rock drill spares, hydraulic assemblies, drill rig manufacturing, equipment refurbishment
- **Industries served**: Mining, construction, ports, geotechnical exploration
- **Notable product**: India's first man-portable drill rig — designed for remote surface and high-altitude sites
- **Contact**: salessupport@bsasindia.com | 03414057522
- **Social**: LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube (search "Bharat Spares and Services")
